Name: UBlendSpaceBase
Description: Allows multiple animations to be blended between based on input parameters

Variables.Name: bRotationBlendInMeshSpace
Variables.Description:
When you use blend per bone, allows rotation to blend in mesh space. This only works if this does not contain additive animation samples
	 This is more performance intensive

Variables.Name: AnimLength
Variables.Description: This animation length changes based on current input (resulting in different blend time)

Variables.Name: InterpolationParam
Variables.Description: Input interpolation parameter for all 3 axis, for each axis input, decide how you'd like to interpolate input to

Variables.Name: TargetWeightInterpolationSpeedPerSec
Variables.Description:
Target weight interpolation. When target samples are set, how fast you'd like to get to target. Improve target blending.
	 i.e. for locomotion, if you interpolate input, when you move from left to right rapidly, you'll interpolate through forward, but if you use target weight interpolation,
	 you'll skip forward, but interpolate between left to right

Variables.Name: NotifyTriggerMode
Variables.Description: The current mode used by the blendspace to decide which animation notifies to fire. Valid options are:

Variables.Name: PerBoneBlend
Variables.Description: Define target weight interpolation per bone. This will blend in different speed per each bone setting

Variables.Name: SampleIndexWithMarkers
Variables.Description:
Track index to get marker data from. Samples are tested for the suitability of marker based sync
	    during load and if we can use marker based sync we cache an index to a representative sample here

Variables.Name: GridSamples
Variables.Description: Grid samples, indexing scheme imposed by subclass
